ACCOMM.ABOUT_L1: Welcome to {{name}}, in the heart of {{city}}.
ACCOMM.ABOUT_L2: This standout property blends modern comfort with authentic Tunisian charm. Enjoy quality services and a great base to explore the region.
ACCOMM.ABOUT_L3: With a {{rating}}/5 rating, guests highlight warm hospitality, spotless rooms, and great amenities.
ACCOMM.EDIT_BANNER: Updating your stay — save to apply new dates to this booking (same room).
ACCOMM.ERR_PHONE: Use +216 and 8+ digits, or leave empty
ACCOMM.PAYMENT_FLOW:
A secure payment page opens so you can complete your booking.

Your card details are never stored on YallaTN — they are processed safely by our certified payment partner only.
ACCOMM.EDIT_PAY_NOTE: Updating dates only — no new payment.
ACCOMM.CONF_DESC_UPDATE: Your dates at {{name}} have been updated.
ACCOMM.CONF_DESC_BOOKED: Your stay at {{name}} has been reserved.
ACCOMM.CONF_EMAIL_SENT: A confirmation summary was sent to {{email}}
ACCOMM.WARN_GUEST_TEXT: Please complete all required fields correctly.
ACCOMM.WARN_STAY_DATES_TEXT: Check-in and check-out are required for this booking.
ACCOMM.ERR_RES_LOAD_TEXT: Could not load your stay reservation.
ACCOMM.LOGIN_PROMPT_MSG: Please sign in or create an account to confirm this accommodation booking.
ACCOMM.ERR_NO_PROPERTY_TEXT: No property selected. Please choose an accommodation again.
ACCOMM.WARN_STAY_INVALID_TEXT: Check-in and check-out dates must be valid.
ACCOMM.WARN_GUESTS_COUNT_TEXT: Number of guests must be between 1 and 20.
ACCOMM.ERR_UPDATE_TEXT: We could not update these dates. They may conflict with another booking — try different dates.
ACCOMM.ERR_NO_ROOM_TEXT: This listing has no room that fits your dates or guest count. Try other dates or another property.
ACCOMM.PAY_CONFIRM_HTML: A secure payment page will open to pay {{amount}} for this stay. Continue?

AUTH_SIGNIN.TITLE: Sign in
AUTH_SIGNIN.SUBTITLE: Access your itineraries, bookings, and personalized recommendations.
AUTH_SIGNIN.SOCIAL_HINT: Some buttons stay disabled until the matching OAuth2 keys are configured on the server.
AUTH_SIGNIN.MSG_SOCIAL_FAILED: Social sign-in failed. Try another provider.
AUTH_SIGNIN.MSG_SOCIAL_TOKEN_INVALID: Invalid social token. Please try again.
AUTH_SIGNIN.MSG_VERIFY_REMINDER: Your email is not verified yet. Check your inbox or use “Resend verification email” below.
AUTH_SIGNIN.MSG_RESEND_NEED_IDENTIFIER: Enter your email or username to resend the verification link.
AUTH_SIGNIN.MSG_RESEND_FAILED: Could not resend the verification link.
AUTH_SIGNIN.MSG_GOOGLE_NOT_CONFIGURED: Google sign-in is not configured on the server. Set GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID and GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET.
AUTH_SIGNIN.MSG_GITHUB_NOT_CONFIGURED: GitHub sign-in is not configured on the server. Set GITHUB_CLIENT_ID and GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET.
AUTH_SIGNIN.MSG_FACEBOOK_NOT_CONFIGURED: Facebook sign-in is not configured on the server. Set FACEBOOK_CLIENT_ID and FACEBOOK_CLIENT_SECRET.
AUTH_SIGNIN.MSG_INSTAGRAM_NOT_CONFIGURED: Instagram sign-in is not configured on the server. Set INSTAGRAM_CLIENT_ID and INSTAGRAM_CLIENT_SECRET.

AUTH_SIGNUP.TITLE: Create an account
AUTH_SIGNUP.SUBTITLE: Join the YallaTN+ community to plan your adventures in Tunisia.
AUTH_SIGNUP.UPLOAD_HINT: Add a photo to personalize your account.
AUTH_SIGNUP.ERR_EMAIL: Please enter a valid email address.
AUTH_SIGNUP.ERR_PHONE_FORMAT: Invalid phone number (8–20 digits; spaces or hyphens allowed).
AUTH_SIGNUP.ERR_CITY_TUNISIA: Please select a city in Tunisia.
AUTH_SIGNUP.CAPTCHA_MISCONFIGURED: Incomplete reCAPTCHA configuration: the secret key is set but not the site key. Set app.recaptcha.site-key.
AUTH_SIGNUP.RECAPTCHA_HINT: Google reCAPTCHA v2 — check the box below.
AUTH_SIGNUP.ARTISAN_LABEL: I am a craftsperson and I want to sell my products
AUTH_SIGNUP.ARTISAN_NOTE: Your artisan request will be reviewed by an administrator before the role is activated.
AUTH_SIGNUP.MSG_CAPTCHA_LOADING: Loading bot protection… Try again in a moment.
AUTH_SIGNUP.MSG_CAPTCHA_UNREACHABLE: Could not reach the server for reCAPTCHA configuration. Ensure the backend is running (proxy /api) and reload the page.
AUTH_SIGNUP.MSG_CAPTCHA_SERVER: reCAPTCHA is misconfigured on the server: secret key without site key. Set app.recaptcha.site-key in application.properties.
AUTH_SIGNUP.MSG_CITY_TUNISIA: Please select a city for Tunisia.
AUTH_SIGNUP.MSG_RECAPTCHA_V3_EMPTY: reCAPTCHA v3: empty token. Try again.
AUTH_SIGNUP.MSG_RECAPTCHA_V3_FAIL: reCAPTCHA v3 unavailable. Reload the page.
AUTH_SIGNUP.MSG_RECAPTCHA_V3_SCRIPT: Could not load reCAPTCHA v3. Reload the page.
AUTH_SIGNUP.MSG_RECAPTCHA_V2_SCRIPT: Could not load the captcha. Reload the page.

MY_BOOKINGS_PAGE.TITLE_EDIT_TRANSPORT_CANCELLED: Cancelled — book a new trip from Transport
MY_BOOKINGS_PAGE.QR_HINT: Show this code at boarding. You can save the image to your phone.
MY_BOOKINGS_PAGE.CONFIRM_CANCEL_TRANSPORT_TEXT: Reference {{ref}}. You may not be able to undo this close to departure.
MY_BOOKINGS_PAGE.CONFIRM_CANCEL_STAY_TEXT_REF: Reference {{ref}}. You may not be able to undo this close to check-in.
MY_BOOKINGS_PAGE.CONFIRM_CANCEL_STAY_TEXT_NO_REF: You may not be able to undo this close to check-in.
MY_BOOKINGS_PAGE.ALERT_CANCEL_FAILED_BODY: We could not cancel this booking. Try again or contact support.
MY_BOOKINGS_PAGE.ALERT_ALREADY_CANCELLED_TRIP_BODY: This trip was already cancelled. Your list is refreshed.
MY_BOOKINGS_PAGE.MSG_CANCEL_STAY_FALLBACK: Could not cancel this accommodation booking right now.
MY_BOOKINGS_PAGE.ALERT_ALREADY_CANCELLED_STAY_BODY: This stay was already cancelled. Your list is refreshed.
MY_BOOKINGS_PAGE.INFO_CANCELLED_TRIP_BODY: Search for a new ride from the Transport page.
MY_BOOKINGS_PAGE.WARN_TRIP_LINK_BODY: This older booking has no trip id. Use Transport search to book again.
MY_BOOKINGS_PAGE.INFO_CANCELLED_STAY_BODY: Book a new stay from Stays.
MY_BOOKINGS_PAGE.WARN_LISTING_LINK_BODY: This booking has no property id. Open Stays and pick your accommodation again.
MY_BOOKINGS_PAGE.MSG_QR_LOAD_FAIL: Could not load the QR code. Sign in again if the problem continues.
MY_BOOKINGS_PAGE.MSG_PDF_OPENED_TAB: Opened in a new tab — you can print or save from the viewer.
MY_BOOKINGS_PAGE.MSG_PDF_DOWNLOAD_STARTED: Download started — check your downloads folder.
MY_BOOKINGS_PAGE.MSG_PDF_GENERATE_FAIL: Could not generate the PDF. Check that you are signed in, then try again. If it keeps failing, the server may be busy.
MY_BOOKINGS_PAGE.MSG_NETWORK_ERROR: Network error — check your connection and that the API is running.

HOME.HERO_TITLE: Discover Tunisia through one elegant travel platform
HOME.HERO_SUB: Cities, activities, stays, transport, restaurants, artisan products, community, and events. Plan, book, and explore with a premium experience from the first scroll.
HOME.MAP_SECTION_SUB: Explore all 24 Tunisian states. Click on a region to discover more.
HOME.TRANSPORT_BUS_DESC: Intercity and local lines across major destinations.
HOME.TRANSPORT_TAXI_DESC: Fast point-to-point rides for city and airport transfer.
HOME.TRANSPORT_CAR_DESC: Flexible car rental plans for road trips around Tunisia.
HOME.TRANSPORT_FLIGHT_DESC: Domestic and international flights to key airports.
HOME.ABOUT_TITLE: Crafting Tunisia's most immersive travel platform
HOME.ABOUT_DESC: YallaTN+ connects travelers with local businesses, events, and communities through one elegant platform. Our mission is to make discovering Tunisia easier, richer, and more authentic for everyone.
HOME.STEP_1: Explore regions on the live map
HOME.STEP_2: Build your route with activities and transport
HOME.STEP_3: Connect with communities and local events
HOME.CTA_FORUM_DESC: Ask questions, share itineraries, and get real tips from locals and travelers.
HOME.CTA_EVENTS_DESC: Festivals, concerts, culture, and local experiences happening all over Tunisia.
HOME.MAP_CITY_FALLBACK_DESC: Discover {{name}} — a Tunisian destination rich in experiences.
HOME.MAP_NO_CITY: No linked city found in the database for {{name}}.

DESTINATION_MAP.TITLE: Destination map
DESTINATION_MAP.SUB: Explore all Tunisian regions with the same interactive map experience.

DESTINATIONS.TITLE: Destinations & cities
DESTINATIONS.DESC: Your hub for exploring Tunisia by city: rich content, trip ideas, and local offers to plan every journey.

PRESENTATION_TRANSPORT.TITLE: Transport & mobility
PRESENTATION_TRANSPORT.DESC: Plan, track and optimise travel: clear routes, up-to-date information and suggestions tailored to each traveller.

PRESENTATION_HEBERGEMENT.TITLE: Accommodation
PRESENTATION_HEBERGEMENT.DESC: A full catalogue of places to stay — from hotels to guest houses — with availability, reviews and tailored suggestions.

ACTIVITES.TITLE: Activities
ACTIVITES.DESC: Discover and book experiences: culture, nature, sport and meet-ups — tied to destinations and recommendations.

EVENEMENTS.TITLE: Events
EVENEMENTS.DESC:
Feel Tunisia’s heartbeat with YallaTN+.
Discover authentic festivals, sports and tech events.

ARTISANAT.TITLE: Crafts & souvenirs
ARTISANAT.DESC: Spotlight artisans and their work: digital storefront, secure checkout (Stripe or mock) and positive impact on the local economy.

RECOMMANDATIONS.TITLE: Recommendations
RECOMMANDATIONS.DESC: A consistent suggestion engine for transport, stays, activities and shopping — transparent, privacy-aware and customisable.

COMMUNAUTE.TITLE: Community
COMMUNAUTE.DESC: Connect travellers, artisans and teams: exchanges, reviews and stories — with moderated spaces for quality discussion.

B1.TITLE: Tunisian artisans
B1.I1: Profiles with specialties, location, and contact options.

B2.TITLE: Catalog & souvenirs
B2.I2: Checkout flow with Stripe checkout and mock payment for local testing.

B3.TITLE: Promotion & impact
B3.I1: Highlighting unique products and short supply chains.
B3.I2: Support for local entrepreneurship and sustainable tourism.
